mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(aa.person_count), 0) FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT COUNT(1) FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.status IN ('approved', 'completed', 'violated') AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate}

SELECT aa.venue_id AS venueId, v.name AS venueName, v.venue_type AS venueType, COUNT(1) AS appointmentCount, COALESCE(SUM(aa.person_count), 0) AS personCount, v.max_capacity AS maxCapacity FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY aa.venue_id, v.name, v.venue_type, v.max_capacity ORDER BY appointmentCount DESC

SELECT SUBSTR(aa.appointment_date, 1, 7) AS month, COUNT(1) AS count, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.status = 'approved' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS approvedCount, SUM(CASE WHEN aa.status = 'cancelled' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) AS cancelledCount FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY SUBSTR(aa.appointment_date, 1, 7) ORDER BY month

SELECT aa.status, CASE aa.status WHEN 'pending' THEN '待审批' WHEN 'approved' THEN '已通过' WHEN 'rejected' THEN '已拒绝' WHEN 'cancelled' THEN '已取消' WHEN 'completed' THEN '已完成' WHEN 'violated' THEN '已违约' ELSE aa.status END AS statusName, COUNT(1) AS count FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY aa.status ORDER BY count DESC

SELECT aa.dept_id AS deptId, '' AS deptName, COUNT(1) AS count, COALESCE(SUM(aa.person_count), 0) AS personCount FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.dept_id IS NOT NULL AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY aa.dept_id ORDER BY count DESC LIMIT 10

SELECT aa.time_slot AS timeSlot, COUNT(1) AS count FROM act_appointment aa INNER JOIN act_venue v ON aa.venue_id = v.id AND v.enabled = '1' WHERE aa.enabled = '1' AND aa.appointment_date BETWEEN #{startDate} AND #{endDate} GROUP BY aa.time_slot ORDER BY count DESC
